consumer_contract.dispatch_actuators: must require a separate exact-readiness queue
consumer_contract.kaggle_prefilters: may seed private proxy kernels; keep proxy boundary

evidence_boundary.next_gate: materialize byte-closed archive/runtime custody, prove runtime consumption, then use exact-readiness promotion before any dispatch

parameters.description: Newton-Schulz/polar iteration count for Muon-eligible HNeRV hidden weights.
parameters.name: muon_ns_steps

parameters.description: LR multiplier for non-Muon params: 1D, bias, stem, RGB/head params.
parameters.name: adamw_lr_ratio

parameters.description: Late-training averaging budget; smoke-only until paired replay proves benefit.
parameters.name: polyak_swa_fraction
